problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
